title: Orbital Strike Cannons Datapack
description: The Orbital Strike Cannon Datapack introduces command driven superweapon capable of calling strikes of tnt at any location at will.
body:
# ☄️ Orbital Strike Cannon – Datapack

The Orbital Strike Cannon Datapack introduces command driven superweapon capable of calling strikes of tnt at any location at will.Featuring multiple firing modes as seen in Wemmbu's Videos.This Datapack can be used for Minecraft Smp Events,Cinematic Moments or even just to troll your friends.

**🔥 Firing Modes**
- Ring Shot – A massive, layered circular blast designed for maximum impact
- Stab Shot – Focused vertical strikes that pierce straight down for precise, high-damage hits
- Spread Shot – A spread out blast that covers a small area.Causing moderate destruction in a specific area

**🎣 Activation Method**
- Fishing Rod Controlled – Use custom added fishing rods to trigger and aim the cannon’s commands
- Command Controlled - Use custom commands to trigger and aim the cannon

**⌨️ Custom Commands**
- To get the custom fishing rods - `/function nuke:givenukes`
- To gain access to use the custom fishing rods - `/tag [player name] add nuke`
- To revoke access to use the custom fishing rods - `/tag [player name] remove nuke`
- To summon a Ring Shot - `/function nuke:ring`
- To summon a Stab Shot - `/function nuke:ss`
- To summon a Spread Shot - `/function nuke:sps`

**⚙️ Features**
- Timed detonations to reduce server lag
- Multiple shot types with distinct behaviors
- Fishing rod–based activation (no extra items needed)
- Smp & event-friendly design
- Pure vanilla datapack (no mods required)
- Works in singleplayer & multiplayer
- Custom Sounds when activating the cannons
- Players requires specific access via having a custom tag to be able to use the orbital cannons

**🧩 Extra Additions**
- Wolf Cannon – Teleports all wolves in loaded chunks to you and buffs them with Strength 2,Speed 2 and Fire Resistance

**© Copyright & Rights**
- This datapack is copyrighted content
- Redistribution is NOT allowed, in whole or in part
- Claiming ownership of this datapack is prohibited
- You may modify the datapack for your own personal use.However the modified version should not be shared to anyone
- If you want to make a video showcasing the datapack.Put the link to this modrinth site in the description
